Schools Closed in Mumbai Metropolitan Region Today As IMD Issues Orange Alert For Heavy Rain
results.description: All government, private and civic body-run schools and colleges in Mumbai will remain closed on July 6 (Monday). The IMD issued an 'orange alert' forecasting heavy rainfall accompanied by strong winds.

results.title: St Catherine woman fined $300,000 for attempting to bribe policeman
results.description: A St Catherine woman who attempted to bribe a policeman with $15,000 to prevent the prosecution of her son was on Friday fined $300,000 or 30 days' imprisonment in the parish court.

results.title: Police probe killing of farmer, shooting of another in Cross River community
results.description: The police said they have launched an investigation after gunmen allegedly killed a farmer and wounded another during an attack on farmland in Biase LGA, urging residents to remain calm. results.title: Jonathan denies report claiming he was offered ₦500bn to contest against Obi
results.description: Eze called on Nigerians to disregard what he described as a fabricated report published by a “little-known website” which “falsely” attributed a statement to Jonathan claiming that he was offered such amount.
